content: NSApplicationDelegate.applicationShouldTerminate: Return .terminateLater to defer app termination while performing async cleanup. Call NSApp.reply(toApplicationShouldTerminate: true/false) when done. Pattern: (1) Return .terminateLater, (2) Cancel in-flight work, (3) Create a bounded Task that waits for cleanup with a timeout, (4) Sweep tempfiles, (5) Call replyToApplicationShouldTerminate(true). macOS enforces a hard timeout before force-terminating the app. Keep bounded cleanup within 5-10 seconds to be safe.
